title: Ava Thirumbipaarthu Lyrics Kalakalappu Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Ava Thirumbipaarthu
Singer: Karthik & Anitha
Movie: Kalakalappu @ Masala Cafe

Unnoda pesa, unnoda palaga
unnodA sirika, assai illa

Un pera ketka, un kanna paatka
manasa iulluka, aengavilla
naan paarthathile
unnai pola yaarumilla

Ava Thirumbipaarthu mella siricha
en mansa konjam kollai adicha (2)

Ennakenna aachu ada theriyavilla
en kaalu tharayathaan thodavumilla (2)

Enna paathukitte paathukitte nadakure
aana paakaamale povadhupol nadikura
Oru poona kutti pola enna meratura
haiyo ennaennamo pannura

Ava Thirumbipaarthu mella siricha
en mansa konjam kollai adicha
Unnoda pesa, unnoda palaga
unnodA sirika, assai illa ..

Munkoba moochazhaga
muthu muthu pechazhaga
mullaichara pallazhaga
onnum puriyum padi illa

8-am pirai nilavazhaga
aerunethi mugam azhaga
7-adukku udal azhaga
aedhum velangaliye ulla

Enna petha magaraasi
paathuvacha silai pola
kannu munna vandhaale
ini sethaalum iva koodathaan

Enna paathukitte paathukitte nadakure
aana paakaamale povadhupol nadikura
Oru poona kutti pola enna meratura
haiyo ennaennamo pannura

Eppavume iva mugatha
parthukitte irukanumpol
nenjuvadam thavikuthappa
suga avasthaiyinu sonnen

Kathirika narukayila
appalatha porikayila
vaanaliyil varukayila
iva nenapil vendhu ninnen

kumbakonam kaaveri
un kaadhil ragasiyama
en kadhal sollaadha
adi aathaadi en aalunee

Enna paathukitte paathukitte nadakure
aana paakaamale povadhupol nadikura
Oru poona kutti pola enna meratura
haiyo ennaennamo pannura

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Ava Thirumbipaarthu'?

The song conveys a playful and cheerful vibe, celebrating love and happiness.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Kalakalappu'?

This song is featured in a lively scene that emphasizes the fun and comedic elements of the film.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song is sung by Anitha and Karthik.

Who composed the music for 'Ava Thirumbipaarthu'?

The music was composed by Vijay Ebenezer.

When was 'Ava Thirumbipaarthu' released?

The song was released on April 23, 2012.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Ava Thirumbipaarthu, the playful duet between Anitha and Karthik encapsulates the joyous spirit of Kalakalappu. The song is a celebration of love and happiness, set against a backdrop of lively music composed by Vijay Ebenezer. It evokes feelings of cheerfulness and excitement, making it perfect for festive occasions. The catchy lyrics by Pa Vijay add to the song's charm, ensuring it resonates with audiences looking for a fun and upbeat track.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Ava Thirumbipaarthu from Kalakalappu is a vibrant duet that perfectly captures the essence of joy and celebration. With the melodious voices of Anitha and Karthik, paired with Vijay Ebenezer's catchy composition, this song is sure to uplift your spirits. Dive into the fun and energetic vibe that makes this track a must-listen for any festive occasion!
stanzaMeanings: When you speak, your words are not sweet, you don't smile much.
When I hear your name, my heart feels heavy, I haven't seen anyone like you.
She turns back and smiles softly, it steals my heart a little.
I don't know what happened to me, my legs are weak and I can't move.
I keep watching and watching, but it feels like I'm just walking without purpose, like a little girl who is lost, oh what am I doing?
She turns back and smiles softly, it steals my heart a little. When you speak, your words are not sweet, you don't smile much ..
Like a flower that blooms beautifully, but doesn't make sense at all.
Like the moon on the 8th night, your face is beautiful, your body is lovely, but nothing shines from within.
When I see you, my heart feels heavy, like a statue that has come to life, if you come close, I won't be able to handle it anymore.
I keep watching and watching, but it feels like I'm just walking without purpose, like a little girl who is lost, oh what am I doing?
Whenever I see your face, my heart feels heavy, I told you about my happiness.
In the eggplant's peel, in the bitter gourd's skin, in the sky, I remember you.
In Kumbakonam, the river Kaveri flows, secretly in your heart, my love is unspoken, oh my dear.
I keep watching and watching, but it feels like I'm just walking without purpose, like a little girl who is lost, oh what am I doing?
She turns back and smiles softly, it steals my heart a little.
